title: Create renewable copper & zinc
description: This is a create mod add-on that make you able to renew copper and zinc supply
body:
This is a lightweight Create add‑on for NeoForge 1.21.1 that makes copper and zinc renewable with early‑game automation.
New recipes:

Heated mixing: granite + clay ball + cinder flour → crushed raw copper (25% extra chance)
Heated mixing: andesite + clay ball + cinder flour → crushed raw zinc (25% extra chance)
Requires Create 6.0.9+ and NeoForge 21.1.218+.

Development assisted by AI tools.
